creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
It would be nice to update texlive-texmf to version 2013 because my frequently used package, exsheets [1] needs newest l3kernel (error message: Package exsheets Error: Support package expl3 too old.)
Thanks.

[1] http://www.ctan.org/pkg/exsheets

How-To-Repeat: Try compile a simple LaTeX file which uses exsheets.sty style.
